heading: This Afternoon
text: Chance of showers and storms, a rising chance northwest.
temperature: Upper 70s to mid 80s south, 70s to near 80 north

heading: Tonight
text: Evening showers and storms spreading south, then tapering off.

heading: Friday
text: Chance of showers, mainly in the morning.
temperature: Upper 50s to mid 60s north, mid 60s to lower 70s south
